title: Best Position for a Service Centre

testcases.input: positions = [[0,1],[1,0],[1,2],[2,1]] Output: 4.00000 Explanation: As shown, you can see that choosing [xcentre, ycentre] = [1, 1] will make the distance to each customer = 1, the sum of all distances is 4 which is the minimum possible we can achieve.
